name: heroacademia
description: kimseungmin's personal harness marketplace — own-code plugins (oh-my-docs, ...). SP/OMC stay on their remote marketplaces.

plugins.name: oh-my-heroacademia
plugins.description: Meta-orchestration harness — a UserPromptSubmit hook reads the harness cards and the session routes each request to the right lane (superpowers / oh-my-claudecode / handle-directly).

plugins.name: oh-my-scholar
plugins.description: Academic paper harness (LaTeX .tex + .bib, concept notes .md) — treats paper writing like code with citation-integrity guardrails

plugins.name: oh-my-project
plugins.description: Project-folder management & evolution harness — knows your local directory like a second brain. Ships generic, specializes to your project the more you use it (structure/naming rules, safe file organize, dataset checksum/split/lineage tracking, self-learning into .omp/)

plugins.name: oh-my-experiments
plugins.description: Experiment-analysis & design harness for RL/ML research — analyze training runs, diagnose regressions, design the next experiment, and run a semi-autonomous analyze-design-eval loop over .omx/ state
